calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-04-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Kenneth Alan Lipson, Esq. for Plaintiff: Grigory Andarasnik, present with Russian Interpreter: Ana Savelyev, and for Co-Plaintiff: Graham Norris, also present.
Parties and Interpreter were sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendants: Jamie Charles Roman and Faith C. Archuleta.
Counsel to prepare and submit ONE proposed Judgment to Dept. 218 for signature.

Jan. 13, 2005
Proposed Judgment rec'd and granted as follows:
Plaintiff: Graham Norris as against both Defendants; Special Damages $1,813.48, General Damages $5,439.00, and Punitive Damages in the amount of $20,000.00 against Defendant: Jamie Charles Roman, only.
Plaintiff: Grigory Andarasnik as against bothe Defendants; Specail Damages $10,102.54.
Defendants are jointly and severally liable to Plaintiffs for costs in the total amount of $2,121.10
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
